heading: Materials, supplies, and fuel payments from Senate contingent fund
label: 6510 Materials, supplies, and fuel payments from Senate contingent fund
text: Payments from the contingent fund of the Senate for materials and supplies (including fuel) purchased on and after , through the Administrator of General Services shall be made by check upon vouchers approved by the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate.July 8, 1935
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 68a of this title
Amendments1946—Act , substituted “Committee on Rules and Administration” for “Committee to Audit and Control Contingent Expenses”.Aug. 2, 1946

Change of NameEffective , Procurement Division of Treasury Department changed to Bureau of Federal Supply by former regulation § 5.7 of subpart A of Part 5 of Title 41, Public Contracts, 11 F.R. 13638, issued by Secretary of the Treasury.Jan. 1, 1947Bureau of Federal Supply and its functions and duties transferred to Administrator of General Services by act .June 30, 1949
